category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split air-conditioners for residential and light-commercial use, including reversible units, exported from China to Morocco

title.en: China-to-Morocco Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Morocco's IMANOR conformity framework, NM IEC 60335-2-40 electrical safety standard, PNEE energy efficiency label direction under ANRE, ONEE grid voltage requirements (230 V / 50 Hz), and HCFC phasedown obligations under the Montreal Protocol. CE DoC is broadly accepted under Morocco's EU Advanced Status.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与摩洛哥IMANOR合规框架、NM IEC 60335-2-40电气安全标准、ANRE下PNEE能效标签方向、ONEE电网电压要求（230 V / 50 Hz）及《蒙特利尔议定书》下HCFC淘汰义务的差距对照。CE符合性声明在摩洛哥欧盟高级地位框架下被广泛接受。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與摩洛哥IMANOR合規框架、NM IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全標準、ANRE下PNEE能效標籤方向、ONEE電網電壓要求（230 V / 50 Hz）及《蒙特利爾議定書》下HCFC淘汰義務的差距對照。CE符合性聲明在摩洛哥歐盟高級地位框架下被廣泛接受。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body decision, IMANOR filing, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current IMANOR conformity scope, CE DoC acceptance conditions for the specific product category, applicable NM standard editions, PNEE label obligations, refrigerant regulations, ANRT type-approval requirements for wireless modules, and ONEE connection rules with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation in Morocco.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构决定、IMANOR申报、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在向摩洛哥出货、销售或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行IMANOR合规范围、具体产品类别的CE符合性声明接受条件、适用NM标准版本、PNEE标签义务、制冷剂法规、无线模块的ANRT型式批准要求及ONEE并网规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構決定、IMANOR申報、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在向摩洛哥出貨、銷售或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行IMANOR合規範圍、具體產品類別的CE符合性聲明接受條件、適用NM標準版本、PNEE標籤義務、製冷劑法規、無線模塊的ANRT型式批准要求及ONEE並網規則。

answer_first.en: Morocco's IMANOR conformity framework (CE DoC broadly accepted under EU Advanced Status), NM IEC 60335-2-40 electrical safety alignment, PNEE energy efficiency labelling direction under ANRE, HCFC refrigerant phasedown under the Montreal Protocol, and voltage adaptation from CN 220 V to Morocco 230 V single-phase are the principal compliance considerations for Chinese air-source heat pumps entering Morocco. CCC is not recognised; CE certification is the practical entry pathway. Frequency is 50 Hz in both countries — no conversion required.
answer_first.zh: 摩洛哥IMANOR合规框架（依据欧盟高级地位，CE符合性声明被广泛接受）、NM IEC 60335-2-40电气安全对标、ANRE下PNEE能效标签方向、《蒙特利尔议定书》下HCFC制冷剂淘汰，以及从中国220V到摩洛哥230V单相电压适配，是中国空气源热泵进入摩洛哥的主要合规事项。CCC不被认可；CE认证是实际准入路径。两国频率均为50Hz——无需频率转换。
answer_first.zht: 摩洛哥IMANOR合規框架（依據歐盟高級地位，CE符合性聲明被廣泛接受）、NM IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全對標、ANRE下PNEE能效標籤方向、《蒙特利爾議定書》下HCFC製冷劑淘汰，以及從中國220V到摩洛哥230V單相電壓適配，是中國空氣源熱泵進入摩洛哥的主要合規事項。CCC不被認可；CE認證是實際准入路徑。兩國頻率均為50Hz——無需頻率轉換。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. Source must be IMANOR, ANRE, ONEE, Official Bulletin du Maroc (Bulletin Officiel), Montreal Protocol ozone secretariat, or primary legal or regulatory source. human_reviewed requires named reviewer sign-off and verified=true on all rows.
